_comment: Copy to context/contexts.json. Handles are referenced as @project:<handle> / @client:<handle> in drafts and instructions; resolved context is injected for the AI. Keep descriptions short and factual.

projects.q3-launch: The Q3 product launch. Owner: me. Go-live end of quarter. Anything mentioning the launch checklist or go-live is time-sensitive.
projects.intentmail: Open-source self-hosted email MCP. Public repo github.com/jeremylongshore/intent-mail.

clients.acme: Acme Corp — active paid engagement, renewal in Q3. Primary contact jane@acme.com (PM). Anything mentioning renewal or SOW needs same-day response.
clients.globex: Globex — prospect, not yet signed. Medium priority.
